title: Elder Care Advisor for Adult Children
description: An empathy-tuned voice agent that helps adult children explore elder care options for their parents. The agent conducts a conversational assessment covering mobility, health conditions, and care urgency, then provides personalized recommendations and schedules follow-up callbacks. Features a talking-head avatar with real-time lip-sync and structured care summaries.

tools.name: assess_risk
tools.description: Records urgency level and risk factors based on the conversation

tools.name: schedule_callback
tools.description: Books a follow-up call with the caller

tools.name: end_call_gracefully
tools.description: Allows the agent to end the call after meaningful work is completed
